titleStmt.title: SII 33.250: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 250. (A.R. No. B 322 of 1953.) Śrīraṅgam, Tiruchinapalli Taluk and District, Tamilnadu.

summary.p: Kūrattaḷvār shrine, west wall, proper left.
This is dated Śaka [1479], Pingala, Pushya śu. 12, Monday. Irregular.

Damaged. Seems to record an endowment of a sum of 2,000 chakra-varāhas, probably towards the purchase of a village, and another, of 1,000 chakra-varāhas in the year Kāḷayukti by Śrīraṅgarāja, son of Pōchirāja of Ātrēya-gōtra, Āpastamba-sūtra and Yajūś-śākhā for the worship of Kūrattāḷvār and conducting the tirunakshatra (natal asterism) and the tiruvadhyayana festivals of Bhaṭṭar. Published: SII. Volume XXIV, No. 481.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbbulu 1479 Agunēṭi piṁgala saṁvatsara puṣya śu . 12 sōmavāraṁnāḍu
Ātrēyagōtra Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yajuśākhādhyāyulaina pōcirājuṁgā komāruṁḍu śrīraṁgarāju śrīraṁgarāju śrīraṁgamaṁdu kurattāḷuvāri kaiṁkariyā
tāṁbra śāsanaṁ
2000 vubhayamu krayaṁvēlu reṁḍuvēlū ruyā
ṁgānu Ācaṁdrārkkaṁgānu śrīvaiṣṇavulu mariṁnni kāḷayukti saṁvva
tsara śrāvaṇa śu 1 nāṁḍu cakra 500 cakrava 500 nnu Akṣarālā yēnūru cakravarahālunnu cakra va 1000 Akṣarālā cakra veyyi va
nitya ḍagānu kūrattāḷvāri Āragiṁccina venukanu dēśāṁtaruluṁnnu śrīvaiṣṇavuluṁnnu Āragiṁpagalavāru . bhaṭṭaru tirunakṣatra tiruvadhyayanālu naḍapaṁ
galavāru . yī dharmaṁ Ācaṁdrārkaṁ naḍacēdi . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānātsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . śrī śrī śrī parinirā
Digital edition of SII 33.250 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
